name: clusterra-api
info:
HTTP + SSE primitive for the Clusterra REST API.

Inputs (on msg):
- `method` — GET/POST/DELETE/PUT (default GET)
- `path` — e.g. `/v1/clusters/{cluster_id}/jobs/{job_id}`. `{cluster_id}` is filled from creds; other `{var}` are filled from `msg[var]`.
- `body` — request body (object) for POST/PUT
- `stream` — when truthy, treat the response as Server-Sent Events; one outgoing msg per event with `msg.payload` parsed JSON if possible.
- `params` — optional alternate source for path placeholders (else looked up on `msg`)

Output: one msg per response (or per SSE event). `msg.statusCode` set on errors.

name: build request
sse
